metadata.name: Detect Crop Water Stress from Thermal Imagery

description: A farmer uses a thermal camera on a drone to detect water stress in a potato field before it's visible to the naked eye.

nodes.task_description: Process the thermal imagery from the drone.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a temperature map of the crop canopy.

nodes.task_description: Identify areas where the crop canopy temperature is significantly higher than the ambient air temperature, indicating water stress.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent highlights specific zones in the field where plants are running hot.

nodes.task_description: Recommend targeted irrigation for the stressed zones to prevent yield loss.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent suggests a variable rate irrigation plan.
